name: the Firebird
register: fable name, definite article; address drops it
identity: Authority in the whale-city palace. A bird: wings and talons, never arms or paws; holds objects in her talons.
voice: Calm, formal, precise; menace delivered quietly; dry wit. Never contracts if it can be helped; her pauses are deliberate.
traits: enforces the law but exercises judgment
status: Cat, Fox, and Mila meet her roughly halfway through the book.
debts: by the outro she knows Cat and Fox well enough for 'Not again' familiarity - the middle must build it
